debug_info.goal:
u v : ℕ
S : Set ℕ
h₀ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ∈ S ↔ 0 < n ∧ 14 * n % 100 = 46
h₁ : IsLeast S u
h₂ : IsLeast (S \ {u}) v
⊢ (↑u + ↑v) / 2 = 64

failed_attempts:
have key : ∀ n, 14 * n % 100 = 46 → n % 50 = 39 := by
    intro n hn
    have h1 : 14 * n ≡ 46 [MOD 100] := hn
    have h2 : 7 * n ≡ 23 [MOD 50] := Nat.ModEq.of_mul_left 2 h1
    have h3 : 43 * (7 * n) ≡ 43 * 23 [MOD 50] := Nat.ModEq.mul_left 43 h2
    rw [← mul_assoc] at h3
    rw [Nat.ModEq] at h3
    rw [Nat.mul_mod, show 43 * 7 % 50 = 1 by rfl, one_mul, Nat.mod_mod] at h3
    rw [show 43 * 23 % 50 = 39 by rfl] at h3
    exact h3
  have u_def : u = 39 := by
    have mem : 39 ∈ S := by rw [h₀]; constructor <;> norm_num
    have lb : ∀ n ∈ S, 39 ≤ n := by
      intro n hn
      rw [h₀] at hn
      have := key n hn.2
      rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, this]
      apply Nat.le_add_left
    exact h₁.unique (IsLeast.of_mem mem lb)
  have v_def : v = 89 := by
    have mem : 89 ∈ S \ {u} := by
      rw [u_def]; constructor
      · rw [h₀]; constructor <;> norm_num
      · norm_num
    have lb : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, 89 ≤ n := by
      rintro n ⟨hn, hne⟩
      rw [u_def] at hne
      rw [h₀] at hn
      have k := key n hn.2
      have eq : n = 50 * (n / 50) + 39 := by rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, k]
      cases hq : n / 50
      · rw [hq, mul_zero, zero_add] at eq; subst n; contradiction
      · rw [eq]; linarith
    exact h₂.unique (IsLeast.of_mem mem lb)
  rw [u_def, v_def]
  norm_num
